comments.author: @AmazingDiscoveriesTopUS
comments.text: Thailand isn't cheap...you're rich compared to the locals.Agree?

replies.author: @uncensoredworldtravel
replies.text: That's a common perception, and it's true that some aspects of life here can be pricey, especially for tourists. However, there are ways to live very affordably if you know how to navigate local markets and transport.
